git_log_commit.message: test(DeleteEventHandler): add unit tests for delete handler
test(CreateEventHandler): cover getCalendarTimezone short-circuit on args.timeZone
test(CreateEventHandler): add conflict detection coverage
test(CreateEventHandler): mock performConflictCheck to eliminate implicit API calls
test(CreateEventHandler): remove unused createEventWithExtendedProperties import
test(CreateEventHandler): remove dead datetime.js mock
(chore) docs update
chore: mark B1, B2, B3 as Done in BACKLOG.md
fix(B3): harden duplicate filter detection in gmail-filter-utils.mjs
refactor(B2): extract format-prefix strings into named constants
test(B1): replace hardcoded EVENT_ID_PREFIX literal on line 138
refactor(handlers): extract magic strings into named constants
test: consolidate googleapis mock, add FreeBusyEventHandler coverage, remove dead batchProcessor
test(handlers): add ListCalendarsHandler unit tests and remove stale index tests
refactor(test): extract Europe/London timezone mock into helper and named constant
refactor(registry): extract extendedPropertyFilters to eliminate duplication
test(handlers): scope fetch mock inside beforeEach and use makeEvents factory
test(batch-list-events): replace ExtendedEvent with googleapis type and tighten assertions
refactor(scripts): replace SECTION_DIVIDER with shared BANNER in email-analyzer
fix(scripts): warn when decodeMessageBody finds no text/plain body
fix(scripts): restore USER_ID import in filter-events-by-date, remove unused printBanner
refactor(scripts): derive TRACKED_LABELS from CATEGORY_PRIORITY; remove dead dedup Set; compact filter loop in create-gmail-filters
refactor(scripts): remove emojis and redundant error handling from verify-tokens; remove emoji from auth-gmail
style(scripts): compact EVENT_SUBLABEL_CATEGORIES to single-line objects in organize-emails
style(scripts): compact IMPORTANT_FILTERS array to single-line objects in protect-important-inbox
refactor(scripts): remove unused id/date fields in email map; use DIVIDER constant; trim metadata request in list-unread-emails
refactor(scripts): remove unused description fields from FILTER_CONFIGS
refactor(scripts): derive applyQuery from filterQuery in FILTER_CONFIGS, removing 8 redundant fields
refactor(scripts): merge two-pass category loop in runRemainingFilters to avoid double ensureLabelExists calls
refactor(scripts): use buildLabelCache in listUnreadEmails and verifyLabels, replacing raw labels.list calls
refactor(scripts): use buildLabelCache in list-unread-emails showStats instead of raw labels.list
refactor(scripts): convert summarize-remaining to async function pattern; pass gmail explicitly; remove emoji
refactor(scripts): wrap archive-old-meeting-responses in async function with .catch handler; extract magic number; remove emojis
refactor(scripts): use createGmailFilter in protect-important-inbox and drop unused USER_ID import
refactor(scripts): replace inline list+batchModify with searchAndModify in billing sections of protect-important-inbox
refactor(scripts): use searchAndModify in protect-important-inbox to replace inline list+batchModify
refactor(scripts): use buildLabelCache in filter-events-by-date instead of raw labels.list
refactor(scripts): use buildLabelCache in protect-important-inbox apply-only mode instead of raw labels.list
refactor(scripts): use decodeMessageBody in filter-events-by-date to remove inline body-decode logic
refactor(scripts): use decodeMessageBody in mark-read to remove inline body-decode logic
refactor(lib): add decodeMessageBody utility to gmail-message-utils
refactor(scripts): use BANNER from console-utils in filter-events-by-date, archive-old-meeting-responses, summarize-remaining
refactor(scripts): use BANNER from console-utils in list-unread-emails
refactor(scripts): use BANNER from console-utils in organize-emails
refactor(scripts): use BANNER from console-utils in create-gmail-filters
refactor(scripts): extract BANNER/printComplete to console-utils and use in protect-important-inbox
refactor(scripts): merge label-status.mjs into list-unread-emails.mjs
refactor(scripts): merge create-billing-filter.mjs into protect-important-inbox.mjs
fix(scripts): correct null-means-already-exists logic in create-gmail-filters.mjs
refactor(scripts): absorb create-remaining-filters.mjs into create-gmail-filters.mjs --remaining
refactor(scripts): absorb organize-events-sublabels.mjs into organize-emails.mjs
refactor(scripts): delete apply-filters-to-unread.mjs (superseded by create-gmail-filters.mjs --apply)
refactor(scripts): absorb check-gmail.mjs into list-unread-emails.mjs --count flag
refactor(scripts): merge verify-labels.mjs into label-status.mjs --verify flag
refactor(scripts): merge mark-labeled-read and mark-past-events-read into mark-read.mjs
refactor(scripts): merge organize-events and organize-newsletters into organize-emails.mjs
refactor(scripts): consolidate filter-creation scripts into create-gmail-filters.mjs
refactor(scripts): consolidate billing filter scripts into one with mode flags
docs(backlog): add two open review items from march-26 code review (filter-utils fragile detection, organize-events-sublabels silent skip)
fix(scripts): correct filterId null check in create-remaining-filters (was !== undefined, never incremented totalErrors)
refactor(scripts): replace if/else category chain with priority-based lookup in list-unread-emails.mjs
refactor(scripts): use ensureLabelExists and createGmailFilter in create-remaining-filters.mjs
refactor(scripts): use ensureLabelExists and createGmailFilter in create-unread-filters.mjs
refactor(scripts): use createGmailFilter and extract EVENT_CATEGORIES in organize-events-sublabels.mjs
refactor(scripts): use createGmailFilter utility and extract constants in organize-newsletters.mjs
refactor(scripts): use createGmailFilter utility and extract constants in organize-events.mjs
refactor(scripts): use batchModifyMessages and extract keyword constants in filter-events-by-date.mjs
refactor(scripts): use batchModifyMessages and extract FILTER_CONFIGS constant in apply-filters-to-unread.mjs
refactor(scripts): use ensureLabelExists and batchModifyMessages in protect-important-inbox.mjs
refactor(scripts): use batchModifyMessages and ensureLabelExists in create-billing-filter.mjs
refactor(scripts): use batchModifyMessages in update-billing-filter.mjs
refactor(scripts): use batchModifyMessages in apply-billing-filter-to-unread.mjs
refactor(scripts): merge quick-status and status-all-labels into label-status.mjs
refactor(scripts): merge mark-all-labeled-read and mark-archived-as-read
refactor(scripts): merge 4 single-filter scripts into create-simple-filters.mjs
chore(.claude): delete ralph-loop local session file
chore(scripts): delete individual sublabel/label creation one-offs (ccv, sentry, social, subject newsletters, performance-tracking)
chore(scripts): delete batch sublabel creation one-offs (all-sublabels, community, events, invitations, work-meetings, newsletter-types)
chore(scripts): delete base label creation one-offs (events, newsletter labels already exist)
chore(scripts): delete verbose filter setup one-offs (meetup-skip, newsletter-skip, promotions)
chore(scripts): delete narrow mark-as-read one-offs (signoz, product-updates covered by mark-all-labeled-read)
chore(scripts): delete diagnostic/snapshot one-offs (check-status, analyze-unread, list-labels, list-remaining-unread)
chore(scripts): delete count-unread.mjs (duplicate of check-gmail.mjs)
chore(scripts): delete describe-internal.mjs (one-off internal team email diagnostic)
chore(scripts): delete show-remaining-unread.mjs (one-off unread snapshot with hardcoded count)
chore(scripts): delete organize-international-house.mjs (one-off International House email organization)
chore(scripts): delete organize-ccv-emails.mjs (one-off CCV email organization)
chore(scripts): delete label-google-workspace.mjs (one-off Google Workspace labeling setup)
chore(scripts): delete label-google-dev-forums.mjs (one-off Google Dev forum email labeling)
chore(scripts): delete label-sentry-team.mjs (one-off Sentry policy email labeling)
chore(scripts): delete search-hackathon.mjs (one-off search script)
chore(scripts): delete analyze-work-invitations.mjs (one-off work invitations analysis)
chore(scripts): delete analyze-subject-newsletters.mjs (one-off newsletter category analysis)
chore(scripts): delete analyze-workshops.mjs (one-off workshops category analysis)
chore(scripts): delete analyze-events-detailed.mjs (one-off detailed events analysis)
chore(scripts): delete analyze-community-events.mjs (one-off email category analysis)
chore(scripts): delete analyze-ccv-newsletter.mjs (one-off email category analysis)
chore(scripts): delete analyze-remaining-invitations.mjs (one-off analysis of remaining invitation categories)
chore(scripts): delete label-remaining-unread.mjs (one-off remaining unread labeling pass)
chore(scripts): delete label-remaining-community.mjs (one-off remaining-email labeling operation)
chore(scripts): delete label-final-community.mjs (one-off final batch labeling operation)
chore(scripts): delete relabel-event-announcements.mjs (one-off relabeling operation)
chore(docs): regenerate repomix snapshots after wave3 refactors
chore(scripts): delete label-google-cloud-feb.mjs (one-off February labeling operation)
chore(scripts): delete check-google-dev-labels.mjs (one-off label check)
chore(scripts): delete final-cleanup.mjs (one-off cleanup operation)
chore(scripts): delete revert-google-workspace-labels.mjs (one-off label revert)
chore(scripts): delete archive-dmarc-emails.mjs (one-off archive operation)
chore(scripts): delete delete-sentry-filter.mjs (one-off filter deletion)
chore(scripts): delete archive-signoz-dmarc.mjs (one-off archive operation)
chore(scripts): delete verify-refactor.mjs (one-off refactor verification script)
chore(scripts): delete cleanup-and-push.mjs (one-off git cleanup script)
chore(scripts): delete debug-tools.mjs (one-off tool registry debug script)
refactor(wave3): extract filter/message utilities, simplify create-* and analyze-* scripts
refactor(email): simplify email scripts to use shared gmail utilities
refactor(gmail): extract batch utils and simplify mark-read scripts
(refactor) /simplify run
chore(claude): deactivate ralph loop after clean completion
chore(docs): regenerate repomix snapshots after lint fix commits
fix(types): resolve lint errors in ListEventsHandler, eventManipulationUtils, and handler-setup
chore(claude): add ralph loop config for repomix simplification task
chore(docs): regenerate repomix snapshots after simplify refactors
refactor(scripts): use buildLabelCache in remaining inline label-fetch scripts
(chore) repomix regen
refactor(scripts): extract shared constants, add getHeader util, and add new mjs scripts
chore(deps): remove simple-rrule dependency and integration docs
chore(docs): regenerate repomix snapshots after recent refactors
refactor(date-utils): remove dead exports, deduplicate parsing, and inline formatBasicDateTime
refactor(handlers): consolidate shared event types and reduce duplication
docs(backlog): mark completed items done, defer email parsing item
fix(batchProcessor): guard pLimit against batchSize < 1
refactor(deps): replace manual batch chunking with p-limit
refactor(deps): migrate general date functions from simple-rrule to date-fns
fix(deps): move @types/lodash-es to devDependencies
refactor(deps): replace custom aggregationHelpers with lodash-es
refactor(repomix): also exclude examples from compressed output
refactor(repomix): exclude config and docs from compressed output
refactor(docs): condense CLAUDE.md for brevity
docs: update CLAUDE.md and README.md with code simplification details
chore(repomix): regenerate codebase documentation
refactor(tests): add assertion helpers for tool response validation
refactor(tests): add googleapis mock factory for handler tests
refactor(handlers): replace conditional field assignment boilerplate
refactor(integration-tests): extract UpdateEventHandler error patterns
refactor(tests): complete fixture consolidation and fix quality issues
fix(tests): address code review findings on event fixtures
refactor(tests): extract event fixtures to shared factories
refactor(recurring-event): use addMilliseconds and formatRFC3339 in calculateEndTime
refactor(conflict-detection): adopt time utilities for consistency
fix(types): resolve TypeScript lint errors across core handlers and services
chore(repomix): add compressed config and clean up stale root files
refactor(date-utils): adopt date-utils across handlers and conflict detection
docs: add M5 backlog item for simple-rrule wrapper pattern audit
refactor(date-utils): add month-end utilities
refactor(date-utils): add compareDates utility function
refactor(date-utils): add duration helpers for multiple time units
refactor(date-utils): use simple-rrule isBefore for date comparisons
refactor(time-utils): leverage simple-rrule functions to reduce custom date code
refactor(tests): use simple-rrule helpers instead of duration constants
refactor(tests): import date-utils directly instead of via factory wrappers
refactor(utils): leverage simple-rrule utilities, remove duplication
refactor(tests): consolidate event-test-data factories and extract constants
refactor(tests): extract assertion and date-time constants to reduce duplication
refactor(tests): consolidate test data factories and remove duplication
docs(backlog): mark TI consolidation item complete
fix(tests): also extract timeMax filler constant in validators.test.ts
refactor(tests): export TIME_MIN/TIME_MAX from test-configs and apply to validators
refactor(tests): eliminate duplicate setup and parameterize test tables
fix(tests): type HandlerSetup.mockCalendarApi with makeCalendarMock return type
refactor(tests): migrate handler tests to makeCalendarMock factory
refactor(tests): consolidate integration test helpers and handler setup
refactor(tests): extract integration test helpers for event creation/update patterns
fix: export makeCalendarMock and correct makeEvent API calls in BatchListEvents tests
docs(backlog): record test infrastructure consolidation opportunities
refactor(tests): extract LIST_EVENTS_API_DEFAULTS and DUPLICATE_SUGGESTION constants
refactor(test): simplify batch list events unit tests
refactor(tests): extract event creation helpers for conflict detection tests
refactor(test-configs): consolidate analyzer config to shared test constants
refactor(test): simplify conflict detection integration test
docs(backlog): record errorFormatting utilities refactoring completion
refactor(base-handler): use formatErrorMessage in handleGoogleApiError
refactor(error-handling): apply formatErrorMessage across utilities
refactor(batch-request): use formatErrorMessage for error extraction
refactor(gmail-handlers): use formatErrorMessage from errorFormatting
⏺ Agent "Unit 4: Add createCreateEventArgs helper + apply to CreateEventHandler" completed
refactor(utils): extract applyTimezone helper for DRY consolidation
refactor(tests): apply factory pattern to handler and service tests
refactor(tests): use groupBy utility in BatchListEvents test
refactor(handlers/utils): use groupBy for conflict grouping
refactor(eventFormatting): use groupBy utility instead of manual reduce
docs(backlog): add L11 event building consolidation tracking
refactor: aggressively apply constants across codebase
feat(utils): add data aggregation helper functions
refactor: extract all magic numbers and strings to constants
feat(tests): add generic test builder factory and consolidate factories
feat(utils): add generic batch processor with error aggregation
docs(backlog): mark L8 complete, add L9 batchProcessor entry
feat(utils): add generic batchProcessor utility module
refactor(services): use resolveTimeRange in ConflictDetectionService
docs: update BACKLOG for Phase 1 test fixture deduplication completion
